title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at BigBasket - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at BigBasket - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the BigBasket family as a Digital Marketing Manager in Pune. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About BigBasket:
BigBasket is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BigBasket!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
